mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_share WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND member_idx = #{memberIdx}
SELECT * FROM payment_share WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND share_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT * FROM payment_share WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND share_status = 'PAID_SELF'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_share( payment_idx, member_idx, share_amount, share_status ) VALUES ( #{paymentIdx}, #{memberIdx}, #{shareAmount}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_share SET share_status = 'PAID_SELF', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_share_idx = #{paymentShareIdx}
